# init(forContact:)

**Initializer**

Initializes a view controller for an existing contact.

## Declaration

```swift
convenience init(forContact contact: CNContact)
```

## Parameters

- **contact**: The existing contact.

## Return Value

A newly initialized [doc://com.apple.Contacts-UI/documentation/ContactsUI/CNContactViewController] object.

## Discussion

This view controller initializes the customized behavior and appearance of [doc://com.apple.Contacts-UI/documentation/ContactsUI/CNContactViewController] for a contact.

## Creating the Contact Viewer

- **init(for:)**: Initializes a view controller for an existing contact.
- **init(forUnknownContact:)**: Initializes a view controller for an unknown contact.
- **init(forNewContact:)**: Initializes a view controller for a new contact.
